intangible_assets.note: AAPL discloses intangible_assets as immaterial; XBRL chain (IntangibleAssetsNetExcludingGoodwill / FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsNet / IntangibleAssetsNet) returns no observations.

goodwill.note: AAPL discloses goodwill = $0; XBRL Goodwill concept not tagged.
